value.found_quote:
## Customize what Codex reviews

Codex searches your repository for `AGENTS.md` files and follows any **Review guidelines** you include.
value.rationale: The page has a section titled "Customize what Codex reviews" describing AGENTS.md Review guidelines and one-off PR comment focus (e.g., "@codex review for security regressions"), directly substantiating the claim. The feature is presented as currently available.
